title: Desktop app 1.1.14: switched from Tauri to Electron
body:
The 1.1.14 desktop builds (Linux, macOS, Windows) moved from Tauri to Electron. Tauri's WebKit backend had memory leaks I couldn't work around. They slowly drained RAM until live streams stopped working.

**Action needed**: your existing server profiles do not carry over to the Electron build. Please add your ZoneMinder server again from the **Profiles** page.

Sorry for the inconvenience. Web, iOS, and Android builds are unaffected.

For background see [#150](https://github.com/ZoneMinder/zmNinjaNg/issues/150).

title: Developer Notice channel is live
body:
Hi! This is the new in-app channel for short notes from the developer. You'll see a pulsing dot in the sidebar next to **Developer Notice** when there's something new. Click the row to read; the dot goes away once you do.

Features supported in notice bodies:

- **Bold**, *italic*, and `inline code`
- Bullet lists
- [Links](https://github.com/ZoneMinder/zmNinjaNg) that open in a new tab

Critical notices (security advisories, urgent action) also surface as a banner at the top of the app until dismissed.
